data.title: Lazarus Group targets crypto execs with macOS malware via fake Zoom calls to steal critical credentials.
data.description: A cybercriminal group known as Lazarus Group has recently been found to have deployed malware specifically designed for macOS. The malware is being used to target executives in the cryptocurrency and financial technology sectors through deceptive Zoom calls. The objective of this campaign is to gain unauthorized access to crucial credentials and sensitive information. This poses a significant threat to the security and privacy of individuals in these industries. It is essential for executives and employees to exercise caution and implement robust security measures to protect against such attacks.

data.title: FLOKI near crucial level at $0.0000336, poised for 34% jump to $0.000045 or drop to $0.00003 as meme coin hype fades.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI is currently facing a crucial point at a resistance level of approximately $0.0000336. It is poised for a potential increase of 34% to reach $0.000045, or it may experience a significant decline back to the support level of $0.00003. This comes as momentum surrounding the meme coin starts to weaken.

data.title: Toncoin aims for $1.55 amid bullish institutional flow, hitting $1.38 and showing potential for $1.55 in 3 weeks.
data.description: Toncoin recently surpassed important technical levels by reaching $1.38, a significant milestone. Additionally, the derivatives market is showing a clear shift towards long positions, indicating growing confidence in the asset. Institutional accumulation trends suggest that Toncoin could potentially climb to $1.55 in the next three weeks.

data.title: Coinbase praises Algorand (ALGO) for its quantum-resistant blockchain, solidifying its position as a top player in this area.
data.description: A recent report by Coinbase praises Algorand (ALGO) for its implementation of post-quantum cryptography, establishing it as a frontrunner in blockchain technology preparedness for the quantum computing era. This acknowledgment underscores Algorand's advanced security measures and strategic positioning within the industry.

data.title: SHIB's hopes of reaching $0.0000085 crushed. 2.63% gain halted at resistance. Possible 70% rollback to middle-band support.
data.description: The recent increase of 2.63% in SHIB has been halted due to encountering Bollinger Band resistance, coinciding with MACD indicating bearish divergence. This popular meme coin is now at a 70% risk of retracting back towards middle-band support as various momentum indicators signal a potential decrease in value.

data.title: Worldcoin's relief rally hits $0.32 then crashes to $0.20 amid rising funding rates and technical breakdown in two weeks.
data.description: Worldcoin experienced a slight increase from $0.27, reaching a high of $0.32 within a two-week period. However, due to escalating funding rates and technical issues, the currency is expected to plummet significantly to $0.20.

data.title: SUI aims for $1.30 breakout with institutional backing. $0.97 support marks potential 30% rise; $1.00 key level.
data.description: The price of SUI has solidified above $0.97, displaying increasing attention from institutional investors, hinting at a likely surge of around 30% towards the $1.30 resistance level. The crucial psychological threshold of $1.00 is expected to act as the starting point for this movement.

data.title: Dead Cat Bounce pushes up to $0.15 before $0.10 plunge due to Layer-2's weaknesses.
data.description: Positive sentiment has caused a rebound from the $0.12 support level, aiming for $0.15 in the next two weeks. However, concerns arise due to frailty in Layer-2 valuations, indicating a potential distribution rally before the price depreciates to $0.10.

data.title: Harju Elekter Group financial results, 1-3/2026
data.description: Harju Elekter faced unexpected challenges in the first quarter, falling short of expectations. Despite a strong initial order book suggesting growth, delays in material and component deliveries disrupted planned activities, leading to orders being pushed to future periods. The main cause for the weaker financial performance was supply chain disruptions. Although the order book remains large, quick cost reductions could compromise the ability to meet future demand efficiently. Retaining skilled staff, ensuring team preparedness, and staying ready for peak season are crucial strategic priorities.

data.title: BCG Reports $14.4 Billion in Revenue, Marking 22nd Consecutive Year of Growth
data.description: Boston Consulting Group (BCG) announced that tech- and AI-focused services now account for over 40% of their total revenue. The company has experienced significant growth, expanding its workforce to 33,500 employees. In 2025, BCG achieved a 7% increase in global revenue, reaching $14.4 billion compared to $13.5 billion in 2024. This marks the 22nd consecutive year of revenue growth for the company.

data.title: New release 'The Doctor's Future' warns physicians to lead, not fear, the rise of artificial intelligence and robotics in healthcare
data.description: Renowned author Dr. Pietro Emanuele Garbelli recently unveiled his latest project in London on April 23, 2026. Following the success of his award-winning book "The Doctor's Voice," his new blueprint focuses on revolutionizing medicine in the age of artificial intelligence. This visionary work aims to provide guidance to healthcare decision-makers and policy leaders to navigate this rapidly evolving landscape. Through his research and expertise, Dr. Garbelli offers a comprehensive strategy to future-proof medicine and drive innovation in the field. This initiative is set to impact stakeholders across the industry, leveraging AI technologies to enhance healthcare delivery and improve patient outcomes. With his track record of success, Dr. Garbelli's latest endeavor is poised to shape the future of medicine.
